_doc: V8 roster: 6 creatures, one per design language (奶团/克劳德/方头崽/波波企鹅/墩墩熊/团团海豹). Single source of truth for the art engine (scripts/gen-art.mjs) AND the backend (web/src/lib/game/evolve.ts). A pet is bonded to a creature (= one of these keys, also its quiz archetype). At the child→teen fork the PLAYER picks which of 4 forms it becomes (the line's true form + 3 named variant forms) — this is a deliberate choice in a modal (POST /api/pet/evolve), NOT decided by how you care for it (care is need-based and must never gate growth direction). The 3 branch slots are still keyed feed/engage/tend for storage compatibility, but those keys carry NO care-semantics anymore — they are just 3 distinct forms. For penguin/bear/seal the 3 forms are REAL related species (帝企鹅/跳岩/加拉帕戈斯, 棕熊/北极熊/熊猫, 竖琴海豹/象海豹/豹海豹). species_id is the key for the true form, or `<key>__<variant>` for a chosen form.

puff.name: 奶团
puff.trueBlurb: 软乎乎的小团子，黏着你最幸福

feed.name: 圆奶团
feed.blurb: 圆滚滚的小团子，顶上还结了颗小樱桃

engage.name: 兔耳团
engage.blurb: 软软一对兔耳朵，蹦蹦哒哒

tend.name: 独角团
tend.blurb: 顶着一只小独角，乖巧又神气

claude.name: 克劳德
claude.trueBlurb: 好奇又淡定的小家伙，爱捣鼓爱做事

feed.name: 饱墩克
feed.blurb: 圆滚滚的方墩，懒洋洋的

engage.name: 卷须克
engage.blurb: 头顶翘起一根灵动卷须

blocky.name: 方头崽
blocky.trueBlurb: 复古方头方脑，话不多、冷面金句

penguin.name: 波波企鹅
penguin.trueBlurb: 高冷优雅的圆企鹅，慢条斯理

feed.name: 帝企鹅
feed.blurb: 橙耳橙颈、气场十足的大块头

engage.name: 跳岩企鹅
engage.blurb: 顶着黄色尖眉冠，蹦蹦跳跳

tend.name: 加拉帕戈斯
tend.blurb: 白脸纹的赤道小企鹅，娇小机灵

bear.name: 墩墩熊
bear.trueBlurb: 黑乎乎大红脸蛋，大大咧咧傻乐

feed.name: 棕熊崽
feed.blurb: 圆滚滚的棕熊宝宝，憨厚壮实

engage.name: 北极熊崽
engage.blurb: 雪白小耳朵，软乎乎的北极宝宝

tend.name: 熊猫崽
tend.blurb: 黑白眼圈，圆头圆脑的熊猫崽

seal.name: 团团海豹
seal.trueBlurb: 圆滚滚的灰白斑小海豹，憨厚又黏人

feed.name: 雪团
feed.blurb: 白绒绒一团，大黑眼睛圆又亮

engage.name: 阔鼻
engage.blurb: 顶着憨憨的大鼻子，一脸老实

tend.name: 豹斑
tend.blurb: 身姿流线，慢悠悠透着股高冷
